overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path beside railroad tracks in a sunny prairie landscape. The character crosses the tracks and continues through open grasslands, eventually encountering another character on horseback riding ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad corridor with parallel dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the railroad tracks, approaching a crossing point

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks running parallel to the dirt path with wooden ties and gravel bed
wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires lining the railroad tracks
unpaved dirt trail running alongside the railroad tracks through grassland
rolling prairie with tall green grass and scattered bushes extending to the horizon
large flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail running parallel to railroad tracks in an open prairie landscape. Telephone poles line the tracks on the left while distant rock mesas rise against the horizon under a bright morning sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt trail diverging from railroad

events.description: character crosses the railroad tracks from left to right, stepping over the rails
wooden signpost appears on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: crossing the railroad tracks and continuing along the dirt path as it diverges from the rail line into open prairie

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional arrow mounted on a post beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the railroad tracks and continues along the dirt path as it curves away from the rail line into open prairie. A wooden signpost appears on the left side of the trail while the tracks recede into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with horseback rider ahead

events.description: horseback rider appears ahead on the dirt path, moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking toward a horseback rider visible ahead on the path through the open grassland

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the dirt path ahead, moving away from the camera at a steady pace

segments.scene_description: A character on horseback appears ahead on the dirt path, riding away from the camera through the open prairie. The landscape continues as rolling grassland with telephone poles visible in the distance to the left as the character walks toward the receding rider.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a prairie trail that shifts from a path parallel to railroad tracks into an open grassland encounter. It begins with the character walking steadily beside the rail line, where telephone poles and distant rock mesas are silhouetted against a bright morning sun. As the character crosses the tracks, the path curves away from the rails and passes a wooden signpost, leaving the tracks to recede into the distance on the right. The scene then opens further into the rolling prairie, where the camera tracks toward a rider on horseback moving ahead on the trail. Finally, the landscape expands into wide grasslands with distant poles remaining visible as the character closes the gap with the receding rider.
